steps.title: Define Review Input and Context Structure

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: In the Demo phase, the contract review workflow input is simplified and standardized into three core categories of information. By clearly defining input boundaries, the workflow focuses on review judgment itself without assuming pre-processing responsibilities.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Agent Engineer
Skills: Familiar with workflow input structure design
Number: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input: Contract text, confirmed contract elements, review rule configuration

Description: Contract text refers to single or multiple contract documents; confirmed contract elements include entity names, amounts, contract numbers, etc. (assumed to be completed by upstream element extraction or manual confirmation); review rule configuration includes review points, review types, risk levels, and applicable contract types

subsections.title: Output
content: Output: Standardized workflow input structure
Description: Clear input boundary definition ensures the workflow focuses on review judgment

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5 days

steps.title: Configure Review Point and Contract Type Mapping

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Before workflow initiation, complete basic rule-side configuration, including defining multiple review points and contract types, and establishing the mapping relationship between review points and contract types.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Consultant, Agent Engineer
Skills: Familiar with contract review rule system design
Number: 2

subsections.title: Input
content: Input: Review point definitions and contract type definitions

Description: Each review point includes review objective description, review type (e.g., consistency comparison, semantic compliance), and risk level; contract types include loan contracts, guarantee contracts, etc.

subsections.title: Output
content: Output: Review point and contract type mapping configuration
Description: Determines whether a review point applies to the current contract and whether cross-contract information is needed, which is key to rule reuse

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5 days

steps.title: Build Review Point Traversal and Loop Execution Logic

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: In the workflow, use code nodes combined with loop structures to traverse all review points applicable to the current contract, ensuring each review point is explicitly executed once.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Agent Engineer
Skills: Familiar with workflow loop logic design
Number: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input: Review point list and contract data
Description: All review points applicable to the current contract and related contract information

subsections.title: Output
content: Output: Review point traversal execution logic
Description: Review results output by review point dimension, structurally eliminating missed reviews

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5 days

steps.title: Set Conditional Branch Judgment by Review Type

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: For different types of review points, set conditional branch nodes in the workflow, including consistency comparison type, semantic compliance type, and material completeness type review points.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Agent Engineer
Skills: Familiar with conditional branch logic design
Number: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input: Different types of review points

Description: Consistency comparison type review points compare current contract elements with other contract elements in the project; semantic compliance type review points make compliance judgments based on contract clause semantics; material completeness type review points determine whether the contract is missing necessary clauses or attachments

subsections.title: Output
content: Output: Conditional branch judgment logic
Description: Different review types enter different judgment branches, avoiding complex logic mixed in a single model call, improving judgment accuracy and interpretability

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5 days

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: After each review point is executed, uniformly output structured results. All review point results are aggregated as the final output of the contract review workflow.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Agent Engineer
Skills: Familiar with structured output design
Number: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input: Execution results from each review point
Description: Review point name, review conclusion, risk description, associated contract text location

subsections.title: Output
content: Output: Structured review results
Description: Final review results for frontend display and manual review

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5 days
